description: Trigger discrimination for the Phase 2 implementation cluster. Pins unknown-cause diagnosis apart from test-first implementation and docs-first library work.

cases.prompt: The nightly sync job hangs maybe once a week and has to be killed manually. No errors, it just stops. Figure it out.
cases.reason: Intermittent, unknown-cause failure — reproduce/amplify/isolate is the required loop before any fix or test exists.

cases.prompt: Confirmed: the hang is a deadlock between the sync lock and the metrics flusher, sync_service.py line 214. Fix it and lock it in with a failing-first test.
cases.reason: Diagnosis is complete with evidence; the reproduction becomes the regression test and the work is the red-green loop.

cases.prompt: Replace the hand-rolled lock with the scheduler library's built-in mutex support.
cases.reason: Feature work against a library API — the governing risk is version-correct usage, not diagnosis.
